Uses of Interface
io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service.ResourceType

Packages that use ResourceType
Package
Description
io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service
An abstract API for making access control decisions about Subjects wanting to perform Actions.

  • Uses of ResourceType in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service

    Classes in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service with type parameters of type ResourceType
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ResourceType<S extends Enum<S> & ResourceType<S>>
    A ResourceType is an enum of the possible operations on a resource of a particular type.
    Methods in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service that return ResourceType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResourceType<?>
    Action.operation()
    Returns the value of the operation record component.
    Methods in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service that return types with arguments of type ResourceType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Class<? extends ResourceType<?>>
    Action.resourceTypeClass()
     
    Optional<Set<Class<? extends ResourceType<?>>>>
    Authorizer.supportedResourceTypes()
    Returns the types of resource that this authorizer is able to make decisions about.
    Methods in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service with parameters of type ResourceType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<String>
    AuthorizeResult.allowed(ResourceType<?> operation)
    Returns a list of the names of all the resources which the AuthorizeResult.subject() is allowed to perform the given operation on.
    Decision
    AuthorizeResult.decision(ResourceType<?> operation, String resourceName)
    Returns the decision about whether the given AuthorizeResult.subject() is allowed to perform the given operation on the resource with the given resourceName.
    List<String>
    AuthorizeResult.denied(ResourceType<?> operation)
    Returns a list of the names of all the resources which the AuthorizeResult.subject() is denied from performing the given operation on.
    <T> Map<Decision,List<T>>
    AuthorizeResult.partition(Collection<T> items, ResourceType<?> operation, Function<T,String> toName)
    Partitions the given items, whose names can be obtained via the given toName function, into two lists based on whether the AuthorizeResult.subject() is allowed to perform the given operation on them.
    Constructors in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service with parameters of type ResourceType
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Action(ResourceType<?> operation, String resourceName)
    Creates an instance of a Action record class.
